Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. is off calendar. A Notice of Settlement was filed on December 7. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to December 12, 2012 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/EHG)

Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Nov-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - FIDEL ALAMILLO, TEL. NO. (925) 324-1726, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS CONTINUED BY THE COURT FOR FURTHER HEARING ON NOVEMBER 16, 2012 AT 9:30 A.M. MR. ALAMILLO TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY WAY OF E-MAIL OR TELEPHONE CALL. HE WAS REQUIRED TO FURNISH THE COURT WITH A WRITTEN DOCUMENT THAT NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE PLAINTIFF OF THE NEW HEARING DATE ON NOVEMBER 16, 2012. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
